• Creates an interactive web page with animated "doofus" dots that flee from mouse movement
  • Features a UI panel for configuring dot count, color mode (single or rainbow), custom color picker, and sound effects
  • Plays sounds when dots are scared away and fetches sound options from an external JSON file
    const proximity = 100; // Pixels until they run away
    this.el.style.backgroundColor = mode === 'rainbow' ? `hsl(${Math.random() * 360}, 80%, 60%)` : picker;

This web application creates a swarm of animated dots that react to mouse movement by fleeing when the cursor gets too close. Users can customize the number of dots, their colors, and sound effects through an interactive control panel. The dots spawn randomly on screen and play audio when scared away, creating an engaging and playful interactive experience.
